user_message: Just got this from Brian Yamamoto at Alpine Ski House -- I need help figuring out deployment blockers. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 09:11 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Alpine Ski House

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 14:57 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 15:20 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Alpine Ski House: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around
